title: citrus khasya
intro: Citrus khasya, also known as Limonia acidissima, is a tropical tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family of citrus fruits. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Citrus khasya include treating digestive issues, fever, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a natural remedy for colds and coughs. Citrus khasya can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as juice, powder, and oil, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
